tooltip.topologyCidr: The network segment of the entry host. After saving, the entry host, same-segment assets, and topology edges will be migrated to the new CIDR.

updateModal.title: Updating Honeypot Config
updateModal.body: The system is rewriting the default topology CIDR, rebuilding Docker containers, and waiting for API recovery. SSH/API will be briefly interrupted; session and topology data will reload after refresh.

progressSteps.writingConfig: Writing config and generating new topology template
progressSteps.rebuilding: Rebuilding and restarting honeypot containers, please do not close this page
progressSteps.queued: Config saved, waiting for Docker update to start
progressSteps.running: Docker is rebuilding and restarting containers
progressSteps.waitingConsistency: Container recovered, waiting for new config to sync
progressSteps.waitingStart: Waiting for update task to start
progressSteps.timeoutWarning: Config submitted, but auto-restart is taking longer than expected. Please refresh the page later.

llm.title: LLM Model Config
llm.ollamaHint: Usually not needed for local deployment
llm.fetchModelsTooltip: Fetch available model list from server
llm.honeypotSaveTooltip: After saving, the page will be locked and the honeypot container will be automatically rebuilt.

messages.noModels: No models found, check URL and Key
